channel.title: Vitals & Signals
channel.description: I started Vitals & Signals because I needed a better way to stay current at the intersection of AI and healthcare — so I built one. Every week, I use AI to research, write, and produce this show: scanning the news, following the money, and flagging what actually matters. What started as a personal tool became something worth sharing. If you're a founder, investor, clinician, or just AI-curious, this is your weekly briefing — built by a guy who wanted one and couldn't find it.
channel.itunes:author: Vitals & Signals

item.title: Ep. 001 — Doctronic and the OxyContin Exploit
item.description: Utah handed an AI the authority to prescribe medications, a security firm broke it in a single conversation, and the FDA has never cleared a single LLM-based medical device — this week, the gap between how fast healthcare is deploying AI and how slowly the regulatory system is catching up became impossible to ignore.
